rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope when bindings depend on subcomponent ports or implementation-level state.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture integrity by only referencing ports, components, and properties explicitly defined in the input model.
Place component-level contracts in type annexes; place implementation-specific bindings in implementation annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Use only identifiers visible in the AADL model structure — no inferred or implicit names.
anti_patterns: Do not assume AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) are accessible as AGREE variables.
Do not generate range comparisons over Boolean or opaque data ports without confirmed numeric scalar representation.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
